title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Online Without Gumroad — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text:
If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, Tanzania, Philippines, or any other country where PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip are restricted, you're not alone in struggling to sell your digital products online. These payment platforms exclude specific countries due to geopolitical tensions, banking limitations, or Know Your Customer (KYC) requirements, leaving you with limited options. You need a reliable and secure way to monetize your digital creations without relying on these conventional platforms."

      "heading": "What Each Option Actually Offers
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad and Payhip are digital storefronts that allow creators to sell their products directly to customers. However, they come with strict rules and requirements, such as KYC verifications and limited payment options. PayPal and Stripe are more flexible, but their country restrictions can severely limit your reach. Meanwhile, NOWPayments is a cryptocurrency payment processor that enables instant transactions across 300+ coins, with no KYC requirements or buyer accounts needed. It's a more inclusive and flexible option, but it still requires a technical setup. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, on the other hand, provides a complete store infrastructure, including the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Dashboard, all in one payment. This bundle includes priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide, making it an attractive option for creators who want a hassle-free experience.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have country restrictions in place due to various reasons, including geopolitical tensions and banking limitations. Gumroad and Payhip also have their own lists of blocked countries, which can change over time. NOWPayments, as a cryptocurrency payment processor, operates independently of these restrictions, allowing creators to accept payments from anywhere in the world. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle takes it a step further by providing a more comprehensive solution that can adapt to changing payment landscapes. With this bundle, creators can focus on selling their products without worrying about country restrictions or payment processor limitations.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

NOWPayments offers instant transactions across 300+ coins, with fees as low as 0.5%. However, creators still need to consider the costs of setting up and maintaining their own payment infrastructure. Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, on the other hand, provides a more comprehensive solution that includes payment processing, delivery, and customer management. This bundle is priced at $79.99, which may seem steep, but it includes priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide, making it a more cost-effective option in the long run. With this bundle, creators can focus on selling their products without worrying about payment processing fees or infrastructure costs.
PayPal's geographic exclusion is not a bug — it is a deliberate infrastructure decision that will not change.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle includes the Core Engine, which provides automated delivery and payment verification. The Wallet Connect module enables seamless wallet integration, making it easy for customers to pay for digital products. The Dashboard provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, allowing creators to track their sales and customer interactions. With this bundle, creators can focus on creating and marketing their products, while Unchained Commerce handles the technical aspects of payment processing and delivery.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Creators who need a hassle-free experience and don't want to deal with payment processor limitations or country restrictions should consider Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle. This bundle provides a complete store infrastructure, including payment processing, delivery, and customer management, all in one payment. For creators who want more control over their payment infrastructure, NOWPayments may be a better option. However, they'll need to consider the costs of setting up and maintaining their own payment infrastructure. Ultimately, the choice depends on each creator's specific needs and goals.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

Can I use Stripe if I am in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan? Unfortunately, Stripe has country restrictions in place, which means creators in these countries cannot use their services. However, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle provides a more inclusive solution that can adapt to changing payment landscapes, making it an attractive option for creators in restricted countries.
Crypto-native infrastructure means no single platform decision can cut off your income.
